hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && cd /Users/finnbryant/Dev/Projects/CryptoApp && uv run python -m py_compile "$f" && echo "Syntax OK: $f" || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$f" == *"data/trades/audit_log.jsonl"* ]]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"audit_log.jsonl is append-only — direct writes are blocked to protect the audit trail."}'; fi
